Name: Average time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants containing both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation in variants where both appear sequentially
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average cycle time of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation when followed by SW-Reviewer Agreed versus when followed by Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time elapsed from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that include SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total resolution time of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation in cases where SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs within the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average waiting time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation until SW-Reviewer Agreed, compared to the waiting time until SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and SW-Reviewer Agreed in high-performance variants (e.g., those with performance < median)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Elapsed time between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants that ultimately lead to RW-EIC Accept versus those leading to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed grouped by case:concept:name to identify outlier cases
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'", 'aggregation': 'average', 'group_by': 'case:concept:name'}"
